title: Gauge Noninvariance and Parity Violation of Three-Dimensional Fermions
canonical_scope: Primary parity-anomaly source for the gauge-invariance versus parity tradeoff behind the induced half-level Chern-Simons term.

section_map.title: Parity Anomaly Main Result
section_map.summary: For an odd number of three-dimensional fermions, gauge-invariant regularization induces a parity-odd topological term in the effective action.
